summary: Verified the responsive modal fix (max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto) for the 'SAVE button missing' bug. Tested all 5 modals at mobile 390x780, 375x667 and desktop 1440x900 + 1280x900. Every submit button (student-submit-btn add/edit, batch-submit-btn new/edit, pay-submit, exp-submit) is rendered inside the viewport without page-level clipping, scroll_into_view_if_needed brings it on-screen, and a real click on Add student at 390x780 successfully saved the student (toast 'Student added'). Discount regression on desktop is intact — ₹200 OFF chip, ₹2,000 -> ₹1,800 strikethrough, 'after ₹200 discount' summary all present.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is correctly applied to all four modal cards (BatchDetail Add/Edit Student, Batches New/Edit Batch, Finance Record Payment, Finance New Expense). Bulk Reminders modal continues to use the better `max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col` pattern (header/footer pinned, list scrolls).

Minor enhancement (not blocking): for very tall modals (Add Student with discount block expanded) consider adopting the same `max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col` layout used by Bulk Reminders so the submit row stays pinned at the bottom rather than requiring users to scroll the form to reach Cancel/Save. Current fix is functionally correct — submit button is always reachable via scroll — but a sticky footer is a nicer UX on small phones.
seed_data_creation: Created 'Mobile390 Student' (₹200 discount) and a 'Mobile390 Batch' (₹1,500) and earlier TEST_DiscUI2 batch — leftover from prior testing iterations. No cleanup performed; safe data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG FIX VERIFIED — all 5 CRUD modals' submit buttons are reachable on mobile 390x780 and 375x667 viewports. The fix uses `max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto` on the modal card div (works correctly). Bulk Reminders modal already uses the superior `max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col` pattern with sticky footer. If user reports similar issues for any *new* modal added later, ensure the same class is applied. Discount flow remains intact post-fix.
rca of the issue: Original bug: on small viewports (<=780px tall) the student modal with discount block expanded was ~720+ px tall and rendered top-aligned without max-height, pushing Cancel/Save buttons below window.innerHeight. Since the modal had no internal scroll, the page-level body scroll didn't apply inside the modal overlay, making the Save button unreachable. Fix: adding `max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto` constrains the modal to 90% of viewport height and enables vertical scrolling inside the card so the submit row is always reachable. Verified by Playwright across 3 viewports.
